final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit shift register with reset and control features. When the reset signal is high, the output is initialized to zero. If the control signal is low, the register loads the input data. If the control signal is high, the register shifts the stored value to the right by one bit, inserting a zero at the most significant bit position.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input control,
  input [15:0] data,
  output reg [15:0] q
);always @(posedge clk, negedge reset) begin
    if (reset == 0) begin
      q <= 16'b0;
    end else if (control == 1) begin
      q <= data;
    end else begin
      q <= {q[14:0], 1'b0};
    end
  end

endmodule
